movies.title: Following the rising sun
movies.description: A grieving young man travels across Japan in search of meaning, only to uncover a hidden past that reshapes his future.

movies.title: Fooling Rudi
movies.description: When a lovable but clueless prankster accidentally impersonates a famous life coach, his outrageous advice turns a small town upside down.

movies.title: Watch your back
movies.description: After witnessing a crime, an ordinary woman becomes the target of a relentless stalker who always seems one step ahead.

movies.title: Restless Dreams
movies.description: Two strangers bound by recurring dreams of each other set out to meet in real life, questioning fate, love, and coincidence.

movies.title: Climbing Mount Trestcold
movies.description: A group of climbers trapped on a deadly mountain realize the greatest danger isn’t the freezing cold—but one of their own.

movies.title: When you think you've seen it all
movies.description: A jaded film critic’s life spirals into chaos when he’s forced to live through increasingly absurd real-life scenarios that outdo any movie he’s ever watched.

movies.title: Whisper his name
movies.description: A journalist investigating a string of disappearances discovers that speaking a mysterious man’s name aloud may summon something she can’t escape.

movies.title: Marillin Martins
movies.description: A guarded artist finds unexpected love when a free-spirited traveler enters her life, challenging everything she thought she knew about vulnerability and connection.
